This game is the ultimate horror game. It is packed with updates new horror levels new cosmetics new map changes map revamps and more. I have been seeing reviews that are saying that the staff is bad but as a moderator in the game the staff only bans people for breaking rules and the people who break them usually get mad because they got banned but our bans are very accurate and the staff team is great if you get to know them. The community is very cool too and they even have a discord server which link is right here https://discord.gg/fmh2 
Overall this game is very fun, has active moderation, so less toxic players and more. So get it right now.
